name: Ion Striker
customPrimary: When hitting hull or armor, has a %s chance to arc to weapons and engines, dealing additional damage equal to the weapon's damage.

name: Pulse Cannon (Mounted)
customPrimary: Continuously arcs to weapons and engines when hitting hull or armor, dealing additional EMP and energy damage. When hitting shields, randomly generates shield-penetrating arcs based on target's hard flux level.
